name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn



(* State of each process: "idle", "trying", or "critical" *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial condition: all processes idle, turn set to 1 *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Transition relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ turn = i
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
          /\ turn' = (turn \mod N) + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = %(i, N) + 1

TakeForks(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = %(i, N) + 1]
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ CanEat(i)
          /\ TakeForks(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
         /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the queue contents *)
(* head is the index of the next element to dequeue *)
(* tail is the index of the next free slot for enqueue *)
(* size is the current number of elements in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

Enqueue(x) == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, x)
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1

Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ size' = size - 1

Next == 
  Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {}
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
